content.en:
The Xuanxuan Master immediately entered a time and space in the Xuantian Sect, which was also the place where the Xuantian Master retreated.

"Master!"

The Xuanxu Controller said respectfully.

The master of Xuantu is not only the Supreme Elder of Xuantian Sect, but also his master.

At this time, the situation of the master of the Xuantu was very bad, the physical body was constantly crumbling, and it was still decaying, and the foul smell permeated this time and space.

"Xuanxu, is there an eternal controller from the outside world, who is it?" asked the Xuantu master.

"It's the Endless Master. The Void Controller reported: "He has a way to solve your physical condition, but I am afraid that like the previous Eternal Masters, not only will it not solve your situation, but it will aggravate your situation. "

"Let him in, now I can only gamble, otherwise, I won't last long!"

The master of the Xuantu said.

"Yes, Master!"

The Xuanxu Controller went out and invited Ye Tian in.

Then.

Ye Tian saw the situation of the Xuantu controller, and it was really more troublesome than he expected.

According to the current situation of the Xuantu master, there is no way to go out at all, if he goes out, he will collapse and fall in an instant, even if he forcibly supports it now, changing the speed of time, it will not be able to support a million realm river years.

One million realm river years is really not a long time for an eighth-realm level master.

"Infinite Master!"

The master of the Xuantu saw Ye Tian and greeted him.

Immediately, the Xuanxu Controller went out, because it was useless for him to stay here.

"Xuantu Master, your current situation is very bad!" Ye Tian said bluntly.

The master of Xuantu smiled bitterly: "Yes, I can't even go out now." Even if you use some life-saving things, you won't stay long. Infinite Master, do you really have a way to solve my body's troubles? "

At this time, Ye Tian said, "Xuantu master, you should have touched a few black auras somewhere at the end of the realm, right?"

Wow!

The Xuantu controller looked at Ye Tian in shock and said, "How do you know? I don't seem to have revealed this situation?"

The reason why he didn't disclose this situation was because he felt that his body was already like this, and the most important thing was to solve the physical condition at the moment, and it didn't help to say that the black breath was useless.

So, he didn't say anything.

However, every Eternal Controller who came here, he revealed the existence of the black aura, but no one knew it, and he didn't know what the black aura was.

"Guess!"

Ye Tian said.

Immediately, he added: "You should know that my master is the Ten Elements Ancestor, so I know some secrets that I don't know, as for what that black aura is, I don't know very well, but your situation, it is very likely that he caused it." Now, those few black breaths are still deep in the roots of your body of control. It's like a curse, if the curse is not removed, the body will still not be better. And I have a way to attract the three black breaths of your body, and then you can recover from your injuries. "

The master of the Xuantu was very excited, because what Ye Tian said was very likely to succeed.

As for the previous few people, they all used some treasures to heal his physical condition, and as a result, the physical condition was stimulated, causing the situation to be even more serious.

But Ye Tian said the root of his physical problems, which was much stronger than the other Eternal Controllers.

Thus, he sensed hope.

"Please save me, the Infinite Master!"

The master of Xuantu hurriedly said.

At this time, Ye Tian smiled and said, "Xuantu Master, in order to solve your physical condition, I paid a great price, and even invited my master, which created a secret technique......

He directly moved out of the Master Ten Elements Ancestor, also to convince the Xuantu controller, and to increase the bargaining chips, otherwise the Xuantu controller thought that he would easily have this secret art, and he would not give too much price.

Anyway, it is impossible for the master of the Xuantu to have the courage to ask his master to verify it.

"Infinite Master, you want more rewards, you can, say the conditions!"

The master of the Xuantu doesn't care about the Tao.

Compared to his own life, those treasures are nothing, as long as he can live, he can do without anything.

Of course, Ye Tian couldn't be so greedy and ask for all the treasures of the Xuantu controller, if he did that, he would be robbing while the fire was on!

"First of all, the three Ten Thousand Phase Statues must be wanted, and then I need to choose ten treasures from your entire net worth, isn't this too much?" Ye Tian asked.

"Good!"

The master of the Xuantu agreed.

Immediately, the master of the Xuantu made an oath to give Ye Tian treasures as long as his physical condition was resolved.

After the oath was made, Ye Tian was ready to rescue the Xuantu controller.

"Master of Xuantu, I will pass on the secret art to you. This secret art is only allowed for you to practice alone, and you are not allowed to give it to anyone else, and I will set a limit on the inheritance in the secret art. "

As he spoke, Ye Tian passed the Black Induction Technique to the master of the Xuantu.

Soon.

The master of the Xuantu has completely accepted the inheritance of the Black Drawing Technique.

"What a mystical secret technique!"

A glimmer of hope ignited in the heart of the master of Xuantu.

But soon, he found that if he wanted to solve his physical condition, he had to use this secret technique to leave the Xuantian Sect and go to the place where the Black Silent Sea was located, and use the Black Silent Sea to solve his physical troubles.

This meant that he had to leave Xuantian Sect.

"Bet!"

The master of the Xuantu said secretly.

Immediately, he took out a life-saving artifact, a treasure that would allow him to stay in the outside world for a little longer, otherwise he would not dare to go out now.

Rumble!!!!

With the blessing of the treasure, the physical condition of the master of the Xuantu seems to be a little better, but it still can't stop collapsing.

"Let's go, Infinite Master, I must use the Black Induction Technique as soon as possible, otherwise I can't afford to lose time. "

The master of the Xuantu urged.

"Let's go!"

Ye Tian left here with the Xuantu Master.

And the Xuanxuan controller panicked, and the master actually left the Xuantian Sect, isn't this looking for death?

"Of course, he didn't dare to stop it, so he could only go along!"

Wow!

The Xuanxu Master followed Ye Tian and the Xuantu Master to other places.

And at this time, many Eternal Masters also knew that the Xuantu Masters had come out, and they followed one by one.

They also coveted the entire net worth of the Xuantu master, after all, this was an eight-realm level controller, once it fell, although the treasure belonged to the Xuantian Sect.

But after the fall of the Xuantu master, the Xuantian Sect was too weak.

Even if the Xuantu controller still has some friends of the Eight Realms level controller, it is not necessarily for the dead Xuantu master.

Therefore, they always pay attention to the situation of the master of the Xuantu.
